rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 9, 2012, line 1 - PLAINTIFF ARJUN DHINGRA's Motion To Set Aside Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend And Dimsissing Case With Prejudice Against Bank Of America,N.A. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE MERINO VS. SAXON MORTGAGE, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 9, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT SAXON MORTGAGE, INC.,and MORGAN STANLEY CAPITAL SERVICES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as follows : 2nd cause of action - to allege breach after of contract execution and fiduciary relationship under California Law. 3rd, 6th & 7th causes of action - to allege fraud with requisite particularity and facts supporting common enterprise allegation. 4th cause of action - only survives if others survive. Pages 16-22 of opposition are stricken exceeds page limit per CRC 3.1113(d) therefore no opposition to 5,8-13, & 16-18 causes of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE MERINO VS. SAXON MORTGAGE, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 9, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RODOLFO VELASQUEZ VS. BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 9, 2012, line 3 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend, plaintiff to allege tender, breach of enforceable implied contract, legal duty of care and fraud with particularity; other cause of action stand or fall on issues addressed above. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs Sought By Deft Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 9, 2012, line 5 - PLAINTIFF JOSHUA ZIMMERMANN and YULIYA ZIMMERMANN'S Motion To Tax Costs Sought By Defendant. Deny - Stokus not on point and $85.00 messenger fees reasonable and necessary. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HPS DEVELOPMENT CO., LP VS. EMERALD MOVING & STORAGE INC.
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 9, 2012, line 6 - PLAINTIFF HPS DEVELPOMENT CO. LP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off calendar, court strikes answer without prejudice because improperly filed by individual see Paradise vs Nowlin 86 CA2 897. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HPS DEVELOPMENT CO., LP VS. EMERALD MOVING & STORAGE INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Ntc Of Motion Of Hearing On Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 9, 2012, line 6 - DEFENDANT EMERALD MOVING & STORAGE INC.'s Re-Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Off calendar, motion for judgment on the pleadings improperly filed, i.e. individual on behalf of corporation. =(501/REQ)
